and 12 signs. The sign
Aries (Mesha) is the birth sign of Kaalapurusha or Time
Personified. the 2 house Vrishabha (Taurus) is the house of
Venus (Sukra). Mesha is male sign & Vrishabha is female
sign.The combination of thesetwo signs is the sign of Gemini
(Mithuna). Next isthe Moon (Chandra) sign, the Karaka for
mother. Chandra is a female planet and sometimes becomes
male planet according to the circumstances. Simha (Leo) is a sign
of royal planet sun (Ravi). The next sign is Virgo (Kanya) which
indicateds the union of male and female. thula (Libra) is the sign
of businessactivities. Next is Vrischika (Scorpio) sign where
lord Subrahmanya has taken birth. Sagittarius (Dhanus) is the

sign indicates the Karma I deed (fruit of one's action). The
